title: stelis erecta
intro: Stelis erecta, also known as the "stelis orchid," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of stelis erecta include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, stelis erecta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
